attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: calculate modulo 256 via x86 assembly
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    lib: true
    scope: instruction
    mbc:
      - Data::Modulo [C0058]
    examples:
      - 9324D1A8AE37A36AE560C37448C9705A:0x4049A9
  features:
    #  and ecx, 800000FFh
    #  and ecx, 0FFh
    - and:
      - mnemonic: and
      - or:
        - number: 0x800000FF
        - number: 0xFF
signature_matches.name: calculate modulo 256 via x86 assembly

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate memory

      - 0x534a@mailbox.org

    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]

      - api: kernel32.VirtualAllocEx
      - api: kernel32.VirtualAllocExNuma
      - api: kernel32.VirtualProtect
      - api: kernel32.VirtualProtectEx
      - api: NtAllocateVirtualMemory
      - api: ZwAllocateVirtualMemory
      - api: NtMapViewOfSection
      - api: ZwMapViewOfSection
signature_matches.name: allocate memory

rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate RWX memory
    namespace: host-interaction/process/inject
    authors:

    scope: basic block
    mbc:

    examples:

  features:
    - and:
      - match: allocate memory
      - number: 0x40 = PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE
signature_matches.name: allocate RWX memory

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: encode data using Base64 via WinAPI
    namespace: data-manipulation/encoding/base64
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    scope: basic block
    att&ck:
      - Defense Evasion::Obfuscated Files or Information [T1027]
    examples:
      - mimikatz.exe_:0x40622D
  features:
    - and:
      - number: 1 = dwFlags=CRYPT_STRING_BASE64
      - api: CryptBinaryToString
signature_matches.name: encode data using Base64 via WinAPI

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: PEB access
    authors:
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
    lib: true
    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - Anti-Behavioral Analysis::Debugger Detection::Process Environment Block [B0001.019]
    references:
      - https://github.com/LordNoteworthy/al-khaser/blob/master/al-khaser/AntiDebug/NtGlobalFlag.cpp
    examples:
      - al-khaser_x86.exe_:0x420D20
  features:
    - or:
      - characteristic: peb access
      - and:
        # https://github.com/LordNoteworthy/al-khaser/blob/master/al-khaser/AntiDebug/NtGlobalFlag.cpp#L41
        - arch: i386
        - characteristic: fs access
        - or:
          # in 0f5d5d07c6533bc6d991836ce79daaa1
          # then we have:
          #
          #     xor edx, edx
          #     mov edx, fs:[edx+30h]
          - offset: 0x30
          - instruction:
            # in the case of CallObfuscator, gs:[rax]
            - mnemonic: add
            - number: 0x30
      - and:
        - arch: amd64
        - characteristic: gs access
        - or:
          - offset: 0x60
          - instruction:
            - mnemonic: add
            - number: 0x60
      - and:
        # WoW64 PEB address is fetched via the WoW64 Thread Environment Block (TEB) at FS:[0x18]-0x2000
        # https://github.com/LordNoteworthy/al-khaser/blob/master/al-khaser/AntiDebug/NtGlobalFlag.cpp#L45
        - characteristic: fs access
        - instruction:
          - mnemonic: sub
          - number: 0x2000
signature_matches.name: PEB access

    name: create or open file
    authors:
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com

      - api: NtOpenFile
      - api: NtCreateFile
      - api: fopen
      - api: fopen64
      - api: fdopen
      - api: freopen
      - api: open
      - api: openat
signature_matches.name: create or open file

      - api: shell32.SHGetFolderLocation
      - api: shell32.SHGetSpecialFolderPath
      - api: shell32.SHGetSpecialFolderLocation
      - api: System.IO.Directory::GetCurrentDirectory

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: link function at runtime on Windows
    namespace: linking/runtime-linking
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
    scope: function
    att&ck:
      - Execution::Shared Modules [T1129]
    examples:
      - 9324D1A8AE37A36AE560C37448C9705A:0x404130
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 01-04.exe_:0x401350
  features:
    - and:
      - os: windows
      - or:
        - api: kernel32.GetProcAddress
        - api: ntdll.LdrGetProcedureAddress
      - optional:
        - characteristic: indirect call
        - api: kernel32.LoadLibrary
        - api: kernel32.GetModuleHandle
        - api: kernel32.GetModuleHandleEx
        - api: ntdll.LdrLoadDll
signature_matches.name: link function at runtime on Windows

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: write file on Windows
    namespace: host-interaction/file-system/write
    authors:
      - william.ballenthin@mandiant.com
      - anushka.virgaonkar@mandiant.com
    scope: function
    mbc:
      - File System::Writes File [C0052]
    examples:
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 01-04.exe_:0x4011FC
      # ntdll
      - 563653399B82CD443F120ECEFF836EA3678D4CF11D9B351BB737573C2D856299:0x1400025C4
  features:
    - or:
      - and:
        - os: windows
        - optional:
          - or:
            - and:
              - number: 0x40000000 = GENERIC_WRITE
              - api: kernel32.CreateFile
            - and:
              - number: 0x2 = FILE_WRITE_DATA
              - or:
                - api: NtCreateFile
                - api: ZwCreateFile
        - or:
          - api: kernel32.WriteFile
          - api: kernel32.WriteFileEx
          - api: NtWriteFile
          - api: ZwWriteFile
          - api: _fwrite
          - api: fwrite
      - api: System.IO.File::WriteAllBytes
      - api: System.IO.File::WriteAllBytesAsync
      - api: System.IO.File::WriteAllLines
      - api: System.IO.File::WriteAllLinesAsync
      - api: System.IO.File::WriteAllText
      - api: System.IO.File::WriteAllTextAsync
      - api: System.IO.File::AppendAllLines
      - api: System.IO.File::AppendAllLinesAsync
      - api: System.IO.File::AppendAllText
      - api: System.IO.File::AppendAllTextAsync
      - api: System.IO.File::AppendText
      - api: System.IO.FileInfo::AppendText
signature_matches.name: write file on Windows
